query: Alien Romulus sequel returning cast Cailee Spaeny David Jonsson confirmation

{"query":"Alien Romulus sequel returning cast Cailee Spaeny David Jonsson confirmation","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1459,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.avpgalaxy.net/2026/04/16/alien-romulus-david-jonsson-gives-update-on-anticipated-sequel/","title":"Alien: Romulus’ David Jonsson Gives Update On Anticipated Sequel - Alien vs. Predator Galaxy","content":"There have been recent rumors and speculation that David Jonsson won’t be returning for the sequel, despite his previous interviews showing how excited he was to work on the next Alien project.
You can also join in with fellow Alien and Predator fans on our forums."},{"url":"https://www.yahoo.com/entertainment/articles/alien-romulus-2-david-jonsson-210901910.html","title":"Alien: Romulus 2’s David Jonsson Addresses Production Rumor","content":"Alien: Romulus, directed by Fede Alvarez and starring Jonsson and Cailee Spaeny, grossed around $350.9 million at the box office.
David Jonsson has shared a positive update regarding Alien: Romulus 2.
Set between the events of 1979's Alien and 1986's Aliens, the film is directed by Fede Álvarez and sees Jonsson play an android named Andy, while Cailee Spaeny stars as Marie Raines "Rain" Carradine.
Following the movie's release, Álvarez expressed interest in continuing the story in a sequel.
The synopsis for the first Alien: Romulus movie reads, "Space colonizers come face to face with the most terrifying life-form in the universe while scavenging the deep ends of a derelict space station." The cast also includes Archie Renaux, Isabela Merced, Spike Fearn, and Aileen Wu.
That series serves as a prequel to Ridley Scott's Alien and stars Sydney Chandler, Timothy Olyphant, and more."},{"url":"https://screenrant.com/alien-romulus-2-movie-update-rain-andy-return-confirmed/","title":"Alien: Romulus Sequel Gets Update From 20th Century Boss Who Confirms 2 Character Returns","content":"The Alien: Romulus sequel gets a new update confirming the movie's status and two characters' returns.
The Alien: Romulus cast included Cailee Spaeny as Rain, David Jonsson as Andy, and Isabela Merced as Kay, with the rest of the cast including Archie Renaux, Aileen Wu, and Spike Fearn.
Taking into account scheduling, filming could start in 2026 with a release to potentially follow in 2027."},{"url":"https://collider.com/alien-romulus-image-cailee-spaeny-david-jonsson/","title":"New ‘Alien: Romulus’ Image Pits Cailee Spaeny Against an Iconic Threat","content":"Empire Magazine releases new still from Alien: Romulus with insights from director Fede Álvarez on film's homage to original and sequel.
Cailee Spaeny's talent shines in Alien: Romulus ahead of joining Rian Johnson's Knives Out movie, showcasing her versatility as an actress.
Empire Magazine officially released a new still from Alien: Romulus in a report that also features words from director Fede Álvarez.
The new image features Cailee Spaeny's Rain leading the way down a walkway with David Jonsson's Andy in tow behind her.
It's been a big week for Spaeny, who was one of the first cast members confirmed to join Rian Johnson's next Knives Out movie, Wake Up Dead Man."},{"url":"https://brobible.com/culture/article/david-jonsson-alien-romulus-sequel-update/","title":"David Jonsson Hints 'Alien: Romulus' Sequel Will Film This Year","content":"After breaking into the Hollywood out of London’s legendary West End on the HBO series Industry, David Jonsson’s career has since exploded following his scene-stealing turn as Andy — a synthetic android — in Fede Alvarez’s 2024 film Alien: Romulus.
Jonsson has since been cast to star as the legendary Sammy Davis Jr. alongside Sydney Sweeney as Kim Novak in Colman Domingo’s directorial debut.
“I can’t share very much,” a sly Jonsson told us."}]}
